name: Y Combinator
description: YC batch application — covers company basics, traction, team, and vision.

fields.label: Company Name
fields.promptHint: The official company or project name.

fields.label: One-Liner Description
fields.promptHint: Describe what the company does in one sentence, plain English, no jargon.

fields.label: What does your company do?
fields.promptHint: Explain the product in detail: what it is, who uses it, and how it works. Be concrete.

fields.label: Why did you pick this idea to work on?
fields.promptHint: Personal motivation and insight. What do you know that others don't?

fields.label: What progress have you made?
fields.promptHint: Traction metrics: users, revenue, LOIs, waitlist, launches. Quantify everything.

fields.label: Tech Stack
fields.promptHint: Key technologies, languages, frameworks, and infrastructure used.

fields.label: How do or will you make money?
fields.promptHint: Revenue model, pricing, current MRR if any. Be specific about unit economics.

fields.label: How big is the market?
fields.promptHint: TAM/SAM/SOM with sources. Bottom-up sizing preferred over top-down.

fields.label: Who are your competitors?
fields.promptHint: Name competitors directly. Explain how you differ — don't claim there are none.

fields.label: What is your unique advantage?
fields.promptHint: Defensible moat: proprietary tech, data, network effects, regulatory, or founder-market fit.

fields.label: Tell us about the founders
fields.promptHint: Background, prior exits, domain expertise, how you met, why this team wins.

fields.label: How many people work on this full-time?
fields.promptHint: Number of full-time team members and key roles.

fields.label: How long have you been working on this?
fields.promptHint: Duration in months. Include full-time vs part-time distinction.

fields.label: What is the biggest challenge you face?
fields.promptHint: Be honest about the hardest problem. Self-awareness matters more than perfection.

fields.label: Which YC batch are you applying for?
fields.promptHint: Preferred batch (e.g. S25, W26). State flexibility if any.

fields.label: Demo URL
fields.promptHint: Link to a live demo, prototype, or recorded walkthrough.

fields.label: Pitch Deck URL
fields.promptHint: Link to your pitch deck (Google Slides, Docsend, PDF).
